summary: Moderate‑rated recording with a notable lyrical moment by Bob Weir on “On the Road Again”.
review: The sole review highlights that Bob Weir nearly sang the original Memphis Jug Band lyric during “On the Road Again,” offering an interesting historical nod. No comments were made about the audio source or overall performance quality, leaving the technical and musical assessment largely unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one neutral‑to‑positive review (3 stars) is available, mentioning a specific lyrical detail but providing no insight into sound quality or overall show performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about audio clarity, mix, or source type were provided in the review.
